Work with Us
Clear options. Calm decisions.

There’s no one-size-fits-all solution.


How we work together depends on what your clinic needs — and your capacity to execute.




Most clinics start with clarity, then choose the level of support that makes sense.

3 Ways to Work Together
90-Minute Strategic Discovery

Complimentary 

Best For

Clinic owners who feel stuck, busy, or unclear — and want to understand what’s actually happening before making changes. 

What we focus on

- Your current revenue model
- Bottlenecks in your booking & sales flow
- Where leads are dropping
- Gaps in team performance & accountability
- Tech stack inefficiencies
- Retention and rebooking opportunities

What you walk away with

- Where you're leaking revenue

- What’s slowing your growth
- Whether we’re the right fit to work together
 

Timeframe: 2–3 weeks
💡 Most clinics start here.

Systems & Revenue Ops Setup

Starting at $750 - Project-based pricing, scoped after the audit

Best For

Clinics ready to fix what the audit uncovers and put solid foundations in place. 

What this gives you

Hands-on implementation of the operational and revenue systems your clinic needs to function more smoothly and predictably — without relying on you to manage the details. 

What we implement (based on your audit)

- Client journey fixes (website, inquiries, follow-ups, rebooking)
- KPI and operations hub setup
- Revenue tracking from consult to p
